shelters.summary: 23 tornado shelters mapped across Montgomery, including locations at community centers, schools, and public buildings.

sirens.summary: 47 weather sirens positioned across Montgomery. Sirens are tested monthly and activated during severe weather events.

calls911.summary: 18+ recent 911 call records on file. Data updated monthly by the Emergency Communications Department. Categories include medical, fire, and police responses.

requests311.summary: 25+ recent 311 service requests tracked. Common categories include sanitation pickup, code violations, pothole reports, and streetlight outages.

paving.summary: 12 active paving projects tracked. Road maintenance is continuously updated by the Public Works Street Maintenance Department.
